_doc: Approved-element regression checks for biz-20apy. Re-run on EVERY new render so an approved fix can't silently regress. Add a row the moment Nathaniel signs off on something.

checks.label: cold-open whiteboard centered
checks.expect: whiteboard centered on the $15->$400 line; not too far left/high

checks.label: Chase $400 bonus shown (not 73% gfx)
checks.expect: Chase offer screen, $400 centered, no cookie box

checks.label: fee panel centered
checks.expect: whole 'Get built-in benefits' section centered; no grey dead space; $2,000 min highlighted

checks.label: tx methods cutout
checks.expect: full qualifying-transaction method line, NO right cutoff; highlight spans the 2 lines; static (no zoom)

checks.label: StackOS hero full-frame
checks.expect: StackOS hero card full-frame; NOT the blog list

checks.label: StackOS square -> full cut
checks.expect: square cutout cuts back to full screen here, not lingering in the square

checks.label: green-screen $4,652 monitor
checks.expect: $4,652 monitor on LEFT, tall, NO grey margins; Nathaniel matted in front; RIGHT side clear for end-screen

checks.label: bed/letter insert END
checks.expect: frozen thumbs-up + cheesy zoom; small TOP banner only; NO large center APPROVED stamp; less yellow
